problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
hypothesis: Neuroinflammation reduction via microglial targeting may resolve What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
